pitch_slide_voice_subhead: Talk naturally — like you would to a friend. Monyvi listens, parses, and saves it for you.
pitch_slide_voice_transcript: I drank coffee for 40 pounds at Starbucks, bought clothes for 2000 pounds, and borrowed 500 pounds from Ahmed.
pitch_slide_sms_subhead: Bank and wallet SMS get captured automatically — no copy-paste, no manual entry.
pitch_slide_sms_bank_body: Purchase of EGP 485 at Seoudi Market on card ****1234
pitch_slide_offline_subhead: Every tap is instant — on a plane, in a tunnel, anywhere. Monyvi runs on your device and syncs when you're back online.
pitch_slide_live_market_subhead: USD, EUR, gold, silver — priced this minute, not yesterday. Your net worth always tells the truth.
currency_step_subtitle: This is the currency of your first account. You can change it later from Settings.
currency_step_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cash_account_tooltip_title: We set this up for you
cash_account_tooltip_body: We created a default cash account so you can start tracking right away.
mic_button_tooltip_body: Tap this mic anywhere. Talk naturally — we'll turn it into a transaction.
